focus_intent: BIG FINDING iteration 2: encoding-collapse plateau is TRIAD-LIMITED, not encoding-limited. Medium-doctrine triad real-QPU 0.5417 vs sim 0.5520 (Delta -0.010 — 1pp match, cleanest of entire 9-audit session). Reframes the 16:30Z hardware-limited verdict. Cache fix shipped in cloud_submit.py (cached service + backend handles + prewarm_backend) — fixes connect-per-pair perf bug discovered in v1 run. Budget exhausted at 0s (40s on pair 1,2). Next iteration 3 candidates: 5-doc set / K=8 on medium-doctrine / variance characterization / TF-IDF diversity heuristic. Operator standing authorization to reset budget based on dashboard math.
